description: Subscription platform comparison for DTC supplement brands on Shopify

recommendation.pre_launch: Loop Subscriptions (free plan for ≤50 subscribers, then $99/mo + 0.75%)
recommendation.at_scale: Re-evaluate at 500+ subscribers — Stay AI if churn exceeds 10%, Recharge if operational complexity increases
recommendation.rationale: Danilo's original recommendation (Skio) is invalidated by 6x price increase ($100→$599/mo). Loop offers best cost-to-feature ratio for pre-launch with proven supplement brand results.
recommendation.upgrade_path: Verify current Loop/Skio/Recharge pricing via official websites before committing. Pricing may have changed since research date.

platforms.name: Loop Subscriptions

pricing.note: No per-order fees is unusual and significant cost advantage

platforms.ionwave_fit: BEST for pre-launch. Free tier means zero subscription platform cost until 50 subscribers. Migrate to paid plan as base grows.

platforms.name: Recharge

pricing.fifty_fifty_plan: $50/mo + no transaction fees for first 50 subscribers
pricing.note: 50-50 plan is new and designed for pre-launch brands

churn_prevention.note: Now supports Shopify native checkout — previous 'No' in Danilo's comparison is outdated

notable_users: Largest merchant base in DTC subscriptions
platforms.ionwave_fit: GOOD backup. 50-50 plan competitive for pre-launch. Best choice if integration ecosystem matters (Klaviyo, Gorgias, etc.).

platforms.name: Skio

pricing.note: 6x increase from Danilo's $100/mo figure. Invalidates original recommendation.

platforms.ionwave_fit: NOT RECOMMENDED at current pricing. $599/mo is not justifiable pre-launch. Danilo's recommendation based on outdated pricing.

platforms.name: Stay AI

churn_prevention.note: AI features are the differentiator but claims are not independently verified

notable_users: DTC brands focused on retention optimization
platforms.ionwave_fit: EVALUATE AT MONTH 6+ if churn exceeds 10% with basic infrastructure. The AI features have most value once you have behavioral data from 200+ subscribers.

subscriber_lifetime.source: Derived from churn target: 1/0.08 = 12.5mo at target, 1/0.10 = 10mo at floor

involuntary_churn_recovery.source: Industry benchmark for full dunning stack

decision_timing.reversibility: Medium — migration between platforms is possible but painful (subscriber data export/import, notification disruption). Choose carefully but don't over-agonize.
decision_timing.recommendation: Start with Loop free plan. Lock in before launch. Evaluate at 500 subscribers whether to stay or migrate.

intelligence_gaps.gap: Current Loop Subscriptions pricing not independently verified on official site
intelligence_gaps.upgrade_path: Visit loop.subscription.com pricing page, screenshot, date-stamp
Check Loop + Klaviyo integration docs, confirm churn signal passthrough

intelligence_gaps.priority: LOW — even if lower, still likely >$200/mo based on market trend
